effect.minecraft.water_breathing.desc: Allows breathing underwater, preventing air loss.
effect.minecraft.invisibility.desc: Renders the entity invisible to others.
effect.minecraft.resistance.desc: Reduces incoming damage from most sources.
effect.minecraft.unluck.desc: Worsens random outcomes by affecting luck.
effect.minecraft.blindness.desc: Severely limits vision, darkening the surroundings.
effect.minecraft.haste.desc: Increases mining and tool usage speed.
effect.minecraft.poison.desc: Gradually reduces health without causing death.
effect.minecraft.slow_falling.desc: Slows falling speed and prevents fall damage.
effect.minecraft.fire_resistance.desc: Protects against fire and lava damage.
effect.minecraft.jump_boost.desc: Increases jump height and reduces fall damage.
effect.minecraft.mining_fatigue.desc: Slows mining and tool usage speed.
effect.minecraft.luck.desc: Improves random outcomes by affecting luck.
effect.minecraft.darkness.desc: Severely reduces vision, periodically dimming the screen.
effect.minecraft.levitation.desc: Lifts the entity upward, removing control over vertical movement.
effect.minecraft.wither.desc: Gradually deals damage and can lead to death.
effect.minecraft.glowing.desc: Outlines the entity, making it visible through obstacles.
tooltip.elixirum.alchemist_eye: When equipped, lets you see the composition of discovered ingredients.
tooltip.elixirum.honey_solvent: Used at the Brewing Stand. Extracts one random essence from an ingredient, letting you discover what it's made of.
tooltip.elixirum.glass_cauldron: Used for brewing elixirs. Place it over a heat source to bring the water to a boil before adding ingredients.
ui.elixirum.mastery.title: Alchemy Mastery
ui.elixirum.mastery.description: Increase your overall mastery by perfecting individual recipes. As your mastery grows, you unlock new styles, up to a maximum mastery level of 100.
ui.elixirum.recently_brewed.body: Use the %s to brew an elixir and consult the %s for further details.
ui.elixirum.recently_brewed.footer: All unsaved recipes will be lost upon leaving the world!
ui.elixirum.collection.body: You haven't saved any recipes yet.
ui.elixirum.discoveries.footer: Discovered potion effects and their essence sources.
ui.elixirum.mastery.hint: Brew elixirs using this recipe to increase its mastery and contribute to your overall alchemy mastery level.
ui.elixirum.style.hint: Change a recipe's visual style, and every new elixir brewed from it will automatically use the updated appearance.
ui.elixirum.effect.unexperienced: You haven't experienced this effect yet, so its properties remain unknown.
assessment.elixirum.mixture: Is it juice? Is it medicine? Hard to tell. Something definitely happened in the brewing process… just not what you expected. Still, it looks safe enough. Probably fine to drink.
assessment.elixirum.pale: A barely-there concoction, closer to tinted water than a true potion. It doesn't do much, but at least it won't get in your way.
assessment.elixirum.cloudy: An unremarkable brew, caught somewhere between water and a proper potion. It carries a faint effect that quickly slips away, like a passing thought.
assessment.elixirum.weak: A fragile potion with subtle, fleeting effects. You might notice it for a moment - then wonder if you imagined it at all.
assessment.elixirum.minor: A simple, modest potion. Its effects are brief and gentle, but can still lend a small helping hand when needed.
assessment.elixirum.moderate: A reliable potion with a steady, noticeable effect. Nothing extravagant, but dependable enough to make a difference.
assessment.elixirum.grand: A well-crafted potion with a balanced and lasting effect. It fits naturally into most situations, offering consistent results.
assessment.elixirum.intense: A potent brew with sharp, pronounced effects. It acts quickly and lingers, leaving little room for doubt.
assessment.elixirum.supreme: An exceptional potion with refined and powerful effects. Its presence is unmistakable, shaping the outcome in your favor.
assessment.elixirum.legendary: A near-mythical elixir, spoken of in hushed tones. Its effects border on the extraordinary, capable of turning the tide when it matters most.
trait.elixirum.focus.max_duration.desc: The elixir is fully oriented toward effect duration, greatly sacrificing their potency.
The elixir strongly favors longer-lasting effects, slightly reducing their potency.
trait.elixirum.focus.high_duration.desc: The elixir noticeably increases effect duration at the cost of potency.
trait.elixirum.focus.moderate_duration.d: The elixir leans toward longer durations with a minor reduction in potency.
trait.elixirum.focus.slightly_duration.d: The elixir slightly extends effect duration with minimal impact on potency.
trait.elixirum.focus.balanced.desc: Effect duration and potency are evenly balanced.
trait.elixirum.focus.slightly_potency.de: The elixir slightly enhances effects with minimal impact on duration.
trait.elixirum.focus.moderate_potency.de: The elixir leans toward stronger effects with a slight reduction in duration.
trait.elixirum.focus.high_potency.desc: The elixir noticeably enhances effects at the cost of duration.
trait.elixirum.focus.very_high_potency.d: The elixir strongly favors effect potency, significantly reducing duration.
trait.elixirum.focus.max_potency.desc: The elixir maximizes effect potency, greatly sacrificing duration.
trait.elixirum.form.potable.desc: A refined elixir meant to be consumed directly. Applies its effects to the drinker.
trait.elixirum.form.explosive.desc: A volatile mixture that must be thrown. It shatters on impact, releasing its effects onto nearby targets.
trait.elixirum.form.lingering.desc: A vaporizing elixir that must be thrown. It forms a lingering cloud, applying effects over time to those within it.
trait.elixirum.risk.perfect.desc: Side effects are completely neutralized, resulting in a pure elixir.
trait.elixirum.risk.stable.desc: Side effects are significantly reduced and occur less frequently.
trait.elixirum.risk.refined.desc: Side effects are slightly suppressed, making outcomes more predictable.
trait.elixirum.risk.balanced.desc: Side effect chance follows their natural weight, without simplifications or additional risks.
trait.elixirum.risk.unstable.desc: Side effects occur more frequently and may lead to minor unpredictable reactions.
trait.elixirum.risk.volatile.desc: Side effects are greatly amplified, with a risk of dangerous reactions during brewing and use.
trait.elixirum.risk.chaotic.desc: Side effect chance is doubled, with a high risk of dangerous reactions during brewing and use.
style.elixirum.locked: Reach mastery level %s to unlock and use this style.
toast.elixirum.level_up.title: Mastery Level Up!
